title: lens esculenta var. himalayense
intro: Lens esculenta var. himalayense, also known as Indian green gram, is a perennial legume plant native to the Himalayan region, characterized by its small, green, and edible pods. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, with its seeds and leaves being used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Lens esculenta var. himalayense include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tea, powder, and oil, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
